title: Whimscape x Trinkets
description: An unofficial add-on pack for Whimscape that brings the style of Whimscape to the Trinkets mod
body:
Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) and his resource pack [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape), which is the basis for this add-on pack. this pack retexture the slots of the [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) mod to fit them to [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)
#### the add-on pack also support: - [_Cosmetic Armor_](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor) - [_Supplementaries_](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - [_RPG Series_](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards) - [_VanitySlots_](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity) ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcf23c2cddb25694ffd2d50ae4d082831c4f95b8.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/371d0f4eb7d4d7faff0776c395446f432d9289ac.png) ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdb07498b7d2ce5ee288cb9ea66f553c99e4aa76.png)
